Hello! How can I assist you today? If you have any questions about machine learning concepts, Scikit-Learn, Keras, or TensorFlow, feel free to ask. I’ll reference the book *Hands-On Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn, Keras, and TensorFlow* to provide accurate answers. What would you like to learn? 😊
